title: taraxacum steptolobum
intro: Taraxacum steptolobum, also known as the Russian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus that is native to Russia and Eastern Europe. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum steptolobum are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and support liver function. Taraxacum steptolobum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
